Nf3 d6 3. d4 cxd4 4. Nxd4 Nf6 5. Nc3 a6 6. Bg5 e6 7. f4 b5 8. e5 dxe5 9. fxe5 Qc7. Now White seems to gain space and Black seems to be undeveloped. But the following moves will show that its not so evident. [[/10. exf6/]] (main line) ==Theory table== {{Chess Opening Theory/Table}}. 1. e4 c5 2. Nf3 d6 3. d4 cxd4 4. Nxd4 Nf6 5. Nc3 a6 6.
